decisions.rationale: Observation resolves to its own base_record_id entity_mta-nyct, which already exists in the registry as MTA New York City Transit (agency). The observation's own base_record_id is the closest match; per canonicalization rules, this is a 'new' decision.

The registry card for entity_melissa-farley-nyct already lists this same source (2012_03_15_brt_hylan_meeting_slides).
